title: Creamy Garlicky Ehomaki
description: A creative dessert where the flavors of garlicky and creamy come together with the crunch of ehomaki. Perfect for adventurous eaters.
instructions: Preheat ice cream maker according to manufacturer's instructions.
Combine crushed ehomaki, chopped garlicky, and crushed ice in a bowl.
Mix well until ingredients are evenly distributed.
Add cream and mix until well combined.
Churn mixture in ice cream maker according to manufacturer's instructions.
Transfer churned mixture to an airtight container and place in freezer.
